testcase.name: test_concurrent_booking_exactly_one_wins

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 9 conflicts but got 0 assert 0 == 9 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: tests/battle/test_overbooking_prevention_v2.py:433: in test_concurrent_booking_exactly_one_wins assert len(conflicts) == 9, f"Expected 9 conflicts but got {len(conflicts)}" E AssertionError: Expected 9 conflicts but got 0 E assert 0 == 9 E + where 0 = len([])
